title: TheGoetyard
description: This mod is a crossover between Goety and The Graveyard, aiming to expand The Graveyard's content for Goety.
body:
This mod is a crossover between Goety and The Graveyard, aiming to expand The Graveyard's content for Goety.
Specifically, the following have been added so far:

Servants: Corrupted Champion Servant, Corrupted Pillager Servant, Corrupted Vindicator Servant, Ghoul Servant, Skeleton Creeper Servant, Revenant Servant, Nightmare Servant, Acolyte Servant.

Focuses: Nightmare Focus, Depravity Focus, Graveyard Horde Focus.

Future plans: Wraith Servant, Reaper Servant.
